CustomField.formula: CASE(Shipping_Method__c, "Airborne-Air-Next Day Air", "Airborne", "Airborne-Air-2nd Day Air", "Airborne", "Airborne-Air-3 Day Select", "Airborne", "APP-Air-Door to Door", "APP", "APP-Air-Worldwide Express", "APP", "APP-LTL-Door to Door", "APP", "DHL-Air-Worldwide Expedited", "DHL", "DHL-Air-Worldwide Express", "DHL", "FEDEX Next Day Air (10:30 AM)", "FEDEX", "FEDEX Next Day Air Early (8:00 AM)", "FEDEX", "FEDEX Next Day Air Saver (3:00 PM)", "FEDEX", "FEDEX 2nd Day Air", "FEDEX", "FEDEX 2nd Day Air AM", "FEDEX", "FEDEX 3 Day Select", "FEDEX", "FEDEX-International Economy", "FEDEX", "FEDEX-International Priority", "FEDEX", "FEDEX Home Delivery", "FEDEX", "FEDEX Ground", "FEDEX", "FEDEX Ground LTL", "FEDEX GROUND", "FSC-LTL-Door to Door", "FSC", "1DAY-PM", "PROSHIP", "1DAY", "PROSHIP", "1DAY-AM", "PROSHIP", "2DAY", "PROSHIP", "2DAY-AM", "PROSHIP", "3DAY", "PROSHIP", "GROUND", "PROSHIP", "INTERNATIONAL PRIORITY-EXP", "PROSHIP", "INTERNATIONAL PRIORITY", "PROSHIP", "INTERNATIONAL GROUND", "PROSHIP", "GROUND HOME DELIVERY", "PROSHIP", "PUROLATOR Canada Standard", "PUR", "UPS Next Day Air (10:30 AM)", "UPS", "UPS Next Day Air Early (8:00 AM)", "UPS", "UPS Next Day Air Saver (3:00 PM)", "UPS", "UPS 2nd Day Air", "UPS", "UPS Worldwide Express", "UPS", "UPS 3 Day Select", "UPS", "UPS Ground", "UPS", "UPS International Ground (CA / MX)", "UPS", "UPS First Class Mail", "UPS", "UPS SurePost Bound Printed Matter", "UPS", "UPS SurePost", "UPS", "UPS Worldwide Express Plus", "UPS", "UPS Worldwide Expedited", "UPS", "UPS Worldwide Express Saver", "UPS", "POSTAL DELIVERY", "UPS", "USPS-Air-International Air Mail", "USPS", "USPS-Air-Priority Mail", "USPS", "USPS-First Class Mail", "USPS",NULL)
CustomField.label: Freight Code
